notes: The issue involves a crash in SkiaSharp.Views.WinUI.Native.PropertySetExtensions, which is a Windows-specific component used in MAUI/WinUI apps. I am running on macOS and cannot reproduce this issue as it requires a Windows environment with WinUI support.

reproductionSteps.output: Current platform is macOS. Issue requires Windows (WinUI).

blockers: Issue requires Windows OS to run WinUI/MAUI workload
Issue involves SkiaSharp.Views.WinUI.Native which is Windows-only
